Ship Library

USFP ONI Database: A curated registry of confirmed hulls, variants, and field notes compiled from patrol reports, dockyard manifests, and recovered telemetry.

Last updated on stardate 9526.0.

Galactic Map Production Flow

Hegemony / Arvonian

Arvonian Base

starbase_arvonian
Hegemony Arvonian Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data StationCarrier
Forward Shield400Hull100
Aft Shield400System HealthUnknown
Design OriginArvonian

Duchess Class Mixed-Use Space Station. Depending on configuration, it can support both civilian and military power. In either case, it can house up to several wings of defence fighters and has a single modest defensive beam turret.

Max Beam Range 2000
Fwd DPM2.4
Aft DPM0
Total DPM2.4

Displacement: 0.015 kt. Armament: 1 light beam and 1 drone or torpedo launcher.

Light Craft Base

hegemony_fighter_platform
Hegemony Arvonian Missing Database Desc PlatformStaticDefenceCarrier
Forward Shield800Hull120
Aft Shield800System Health200
Design OriginArvonian

The Hive Class Light Craft Platform is of Arvonian origin; however, it has been deployed throughout Hegemony space wherever a volume of space needs to be defended or patrolled.

Max Beam Range 1200

Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

Hegemony / Arvonian

Platform

arvonian_platform
Hegemony Arvonian Missing Database Desc StaticDefense
Forward Shield200Hull150
Aft Shield200System Health200
Design OriginArvonian

Arvonian Fighter Platform. Contains maintenance, barracks, and command facilities for a large wing of small fighters or bombers. This variant is optimised for Arvonian use.

Hegemony / Hegemony

Transport

Hegemony_Transport
Hegemony Hegemony Missing Database DescMissing Design Origin Icon Ship
Forward Shield100Hull10
Aft Shield100System Health40
Design OriginHegemony

Hegemony Armored Transport. This design is used extensively both militarily and in civilian use. It is both armed and armored to deal with pirates and raids.

Hegemony / Kralien

Beam Defense

hegemony_beam_platform
Hegemony Kralien Missing Database Desc PlatformStaticDefenceBeam
Forward Shield900Hull120
Aft Shield900System Health200
Design OriginKralien

Kralien in manufacture, this is a standardised beam defence platform that can be found in all territories of the Hegemony. 5 x 1.2G beams are its typical loadout, but it is designed with some upgradability in mind.

Max Beam Range 2600
Fwd DPM20
Aft DPM0
Total DPM20

A Hegemony-designed docking facility for the construction, overhaul, and repair of Hegemony spaceships.

Hegemony / Kralien

Gas Extractor

hegemony_gasextractor
Hegemony Kralien Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data StaticIndustrial
Forward Shield200Hull150
Aft Shield200System HealthUnknown
Design OriginKralien

This Industrial Facility is Torgoth in origin; however, it has been co-opted by the Hegemony factions at large. It is designed to extract materials from nebulae for use in many industrial processes.

No range data
Fwd DPM10
Aft DPM10
Total DPM20

Hegemony / Kralien

Generator

hegemony_generator
Hegemony Kralien Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data StaticIndustrialGenerator
Forward Shield200Hull150
Aft Shield200System HealthUnknown
Design OriginKralien

A high-powered generator. This unit can be modified in a number of ways for various purposes, all of them requiring high amounts of energy. It can remotely beam power to nearby ships or structures, or in some instances be used by onboard equipment.

Max Beam Range 600
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

Hegemony / Kralien

Hegemony Accumulator

Hegemony_SlingAcu
Hegemony Kralien Missing Database Desc PlatformStatic
Forward Shield500Hull150
Aft Shield500System Health600
Design OriginKralien

This device is designed to accumulate huge amounts of power and store it for use with a slingshot array or other super-high-energy device. Whilst the device normally dissipates energy safely on destruction, under some circumstances it can detonate with the force of many anti-ship nukes.

No range data
Fwd DPM10
Aft DPM10
Total DPM10

Hegemony / Kralien

Kralien Base

starbase_kralien
Hegemony Kralien Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data Station
Forward Shield3000Hull100
Aft Shield3000System HealthUnknown
Design OriginKralien

Collection Class Space Station. This mass-produced design is made for cheap manufacture and even quicker assembly on site. This station can be found throughout Hegemony space as a cost-effective station for all but the most specialist requirements.

Max Beam Range 1000
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

Hegemony / Kralien

Slingshot Antenna

Hegemony_SlingAntenna
Hegemony Kralien Missing Database Desc PlatformStatic
Forward Shield500Hull100
Aft Shield500System Health400
Design OriginKralien

This is a target antenna for a slingshot array. It is designed to pull ships that are travelling via slingshot towards it, inducing the field to collapse nearby, 0-100K, as opposed to somewhere inside about 20 AU.

No range data
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

Hegemony / Kralien

Slingshot Platform

Hegemony_Slingshot
Hegemony Kralien Missing Database Desc PlatformStatic
Forward Shield5000Hull500
Aft Shield5000System Health2000
Design OriginKralien

The Slingshot Platform design was stolen from the USFP during the Long Bar Conflict. It is an old FTL method that literally flings fleets across several sectors. It can fire multiple times an hour depending on the energy available. After use for between 30 minutes and 3 hours, it requires extensive downtime. Inherently inaccurate, even when the destination has a set-up antenna.

No range data
Fwd DPM60
Aft DPM0
Total DPM60

Hegemony / Skaraan

Skaraan Base

starbase_skaraan
Hegemony Skaraan Missing Database DescMissing System Health DataMissing Ship Image Station
Forward Shield500Hull100
Aft Shield500System HealthUnknown
Design OriginSkaraan

Standard Model Skarran Military Post. This modular design is mass-produced with several configurations for widely separate uses. Designed for use by various Skarran war mercenary groups. The base model is unremarkable, but it has an extensive module bay that may hold additional abilities depending on the owner's purse.

Max Beam Range 1000
Fwd DPM30
Aft DPM0
Total DPM30

Hegemony / Torgoth

Torgoth Base

starbase_torgoth
Hegemony Torgoth Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data Station
Forward Shield600Hull200
Aft Shield600System HealthUnknown
Design OriginTorgoth

Chieftain Class Torgoth Base. As per Torgoth doctrine, it has some of the heaviest shields known and an armored hull to boot. It has a relatively wimpy single beam, however, but comes equipped with a drone launcher.

Max Beam Range 1500Drone Endurance 30

Aft DPM0
Total DPM20

Pirate / Pirate

Arrow

pirate_arrow
Pirate Pirate Missing Database DescMissing Ship Image Ship
Forward Shield80Hull2
Aft Shield80System Health40
Design OriginPirate

Arrow Class Scout Cruiser. Fast but typically easy to outmanoeuvre, it is used for scouting and interception duties.

Known Possible Special Systems

Spoofing
Max Beam Range 1200
Fwd DPM30
Aft DPM0
Total DPM30

Pirate / Pirate

Axe

pirate_axe
Pirate Pirate Missing Database DescMissing Ship Image Ship
Forward Shield80Hull2
Aft Shield80System Health50
Design OriginPirate

Axe Class Cruiser. The Axe is a more general combatant. It is moderately tough to kill, but has a unique multi-barrelled beam array that is capable of firing very rapidly. This is significantly weaker against shields, but devastating against armor and hull.

Known Possible Special Systems

Spoofing
Max Beam Range 1000
Fwd DPM20
Aft DPM10

Built into an asteroid, this base has a lot of the features of a normal commercial space station, without the safety regs. It appears to have a small fighter bay and a modular mount for other defences.

Duodenary

Caltron_U12
Unaligned Caltron Missing Database DescMissing System Health DataMissing Design Origin Icon ShipSupportPatrolLightDefender
Forward Shield620Hull12
Aft Shield620System HealthUnknown
Design OriginCaltron

12 Caltron units combined. Has similar compute power to the U6 but is combat-focused, equivalent to capital ships, and may launch a number of primary Caltron units.

A single Caltron unit. Relatively weak, not sentient in its own right; more of an automated fighter/scout.

Unaligned / Caltron

Quaternary-Octonary

Caltron_U48
Unaligned Caltron Missing Database DescMissing System Health DataMissing Design Origin Icon ShipSupportPatrolLightDefender
Forward Shield3000Hull25
Aft Shield3000System HealthUnknown
Design OriginCaltron

48 Caltron units. This is a regional command node. It is not very manoeuvrable but is tough, smart, and often has unique abilities. Known examples include opening singularity portals for travel to and from, cloaking, and orbital bombardment.

No range data
Fwd DPM34.4
Aft DPM40
Total DPM74.4

Unaligned / Caltron

Senary

Caltron_U6
Unaligned Caltron Missing Database DescMissing System Health DataMissing Design Origin Icon ShipSupportPatrolLightDefender
Forward Shield150Hull8
Aft Shield120System HealthUnknown
Design OriginCaltron

6 Caltron units connected, giving enough computing power to make decisions. Loyal to its programming but occasionally flexible in thinking. About equivalent to a heavy cruiser.

Max Beam Range 1400
Fwd DPM34.4
Aft DPM0
Total DPM34.4

Unaligned / Caltron

Tertiary

Caltron_U3
Unaligned Caltron Missing Database DescMissing System Health DataMissing Design Origin Icon ShipSupportPatrolLightDefender
Forward Shield80Hull5
Aft Shield80System HealthUnknown
Design OriginCaltron

3-unit Caltron ship about equivalent to a destroyer. Bloody-minded but can communicate at need. Slavish to orders.

Max Beam Range 1200
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

Unaligned / Caltron

Vigenary-Quaternary

Caltron_U24
Unaligned Caltron Missing Database DescMissing System Health DataMissing Design Origin Icon ShipSupportPatrolLightDefender
Forward Shield1000Hull15
Aft Shield1000System HealthUnknown
Design OriginCaltron

24 Caltron units. A powerful decision-making and strategising unit that is not often seen. It acts as a command node and can control most of the units in a system. It tends to hide but is extremely dangerous if it enters the fray. Do not approach without backup.

No range data
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

Assembly Yard

usfp_industrial_assembly
USFP USFP Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data PlatformStaticIndustrial
Forward Shield200Hull150
Aft Shield200System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

This is a Bidilin Class modular Industrial Assembly Unit. It specialises in final assembly of goods from components, from home appliances to lab equipment to even small spacecraft. This unit can be configured for a wide range of applications.

No range data
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

Cargo

cargo_ship
USFP USFP Missing System Health Data ShipCivilianCargo
Forward Shield70Hull2
Aft Shield70System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

The Hermes class cargo ship was designed by the Vorex of the USFP and can be encountered in systems across the USFP. The cargo ship has also been successfully traded with other local species along the USFP border.

The Hermes class of cargo ships is perfectly suited to transporting vital supplies to the various USFP colonies and stations around the galaxy due to its large cargo capacity and space for a single transport shuttle craft.

No range data
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

starbase_civil

starbase_command
USFP USFP Missing Database DescMissing ShipData DescriptionMissing System Health Data Station

USFP / USFP

Deep Space Station

starbase_deep_space
USFP USFP Missing Database DescMissing System Health DataMissing Ship Image Station
Forward Shield600Hull200
Aft Shield600System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

The Deep Solitude DS Station is designed to exist on the frontiers of USFP space with little to no support. Strong shields, a large cargo bay, and other defences mean it can hold its own. It has a decent science wing and good amenities.

Max Beam Range 1100
Fwd DPM20
Aft DPM20
Total DPM20

USFP / USFP

Fighter Platform

defense_platform_fighter
USFP USFP Missing Database Desc PlatformStaticDefense
Forward Shield500Hull250
Aft Shield500System Health200
Design OriginUSFP

The Allard Industries Fighter Platform is a high-tech mini station designed exclusively as a defensive or patrol point base for light in-system shuttles and combat craft. Often used by the USFP Customs Agency at borders to house inspection craft or at military facilities to provide a greater patrol and defence installation than torpedo or beam batteries.

Max Beam Range 600
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

USFP / USFP

Industrial Unit

usfp_industrial_unit
USFP USFP Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data PlatformStaticIndustrial
Forward Shield200Hull150
Aft Shield200System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

Unity Class Industrial Unit. This is basically a large box where all sorts of additive and reductive processing occurs to produce components or finished items. Typically has a large wing for design.

No range data
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

Jump Node

jump_node
USFP USFP Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data Node
Forward Shield200Hull150
Aft Shield200System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

Oliver Class Jump Tether. This unit tethers and provides critical sensor and nav data to ships wanting to transition the linked naturally forming jump node. Most civilian ships can't travel intersolar without a properly functioning node.

No range data
Fwd DPM20
Aft DPM20
Total DPM40

USFP / USFP

LR Beam Platform

defense_platform_beam
USFP USFP Missing Database Desc PlatformStaticDefense
Forward Shield500Hull250
Aft Shield500System Health200
Design OriginUSFP

The Vorkosican Class Beam Platform offers a stable power supply for some of the longest-range beams the USFP knows how to construct. Often found at sites of particular importance to the USFP, its design was stolen a number of years ago.

Max Beam Range 2500
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

Luxury Liner

luxury_liner
USFP USFP Missing System Health Data ShipCivilianLuxury
Forward Shield90Hull5
Aft Shield90System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

The Elysium class luxury liner was constructed under commission by the Orion Leisure Consortium and remains a hallmark of interstellar opulence within USFP space. It is commonly encountered along major trade routes and in high traffic systems where these vessels provide first class accommodations for diplomats merchants and wealthy travelers. Featuring grand observation decks zero gravity entertainment chambers and full service hospitality suites the Elysium class symbolizes comfort and prestige. Its presence in any system is often regarded as a sign of prosperity and stable relations within the region.

No range data
Fwd DPM30
Aft DPM0
Total DPM30

USFP / USFP

Patrol Boat

usfp_patrol_boat
USFP USFP Missing Database Desc Ship
Forward Shield80Hull2
Aft Shield80System Health40
Design OriginUSFP

Sword Class Patrol Boat. Used by system defence forces and various licensed security forces.

Known Possible Special Systems

AntiTorp
Max Beam Range 1000Drone Endurance 20
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

Processor Unit

usfp_industrial_processor
USFP USFP Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data PlatformStaticIndustrial
Forward Shield200Hull150
Aft Shield200System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

The Theros Type Industrial Processor, useful for creating many types of components out of refined bar stock, or simply the industrial-scale manufacturing of simple items.

No range data
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

Refinary Unit

usfp_industrial_refinary
USFP USFP Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data PlatformStaticIndustrial
Forward Shield200Hull150
Aft Shield200System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

This large unit is designed to break down raw asteroids into useful materials; half of the USFP is built from outputs of units like this.

No range data
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

Science

science_ship
USFP USFP Missing System Health Data ShipCivilianScience
Forward Shield60Hull2
Aft Shield60System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

The Daedalus class science vessel was developed by the USFP Advanced Research Division in cooperation with the Vorex Engineering Guild. These ships can often be found charting unexplored systems and conducting deep space analysis across the USFP frontier. Equipped with advanced sensor arrays and modular laboratories as well as containment facilities the Daedalus class is capable of supporting long term research missions. Its design emphasizes versatility and allows it to conduct everything from planetary surveys to biological and astronomical studies vital to the expansion of USFP scientific knowledge.

No range data
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

Ship Yard

usfp_shipyard
USFP USFP Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data StaticIndustrial
Forward Shield200Hull150
Aft Shield200System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

ARC-class shipyard — Auxiliary Refit and Construction — A modular support platform designed for the assembly, repair, and modernization of military and commercial spacecraft. The class features expandable drydock frames, heavy fabrication gantries, stores modules, and reactor service booms.

No range data
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

Storage Module

usfp_industrial_storage
USFP USFP Missing Database DescMissing System Health Data StaticIndustrial
Forward Shield200Hull150
Aft Shield200System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

This is a storage area for nearby stations and industrial facilities. Rarely has anything more than a basic docking system and is typically private.

No range data
Fwd DPM10
Aft DPM10
Total DPM20

USFP / USFP

Torpedo Platform

defense_platform_torp
USFP USFP Missing Database Desc PlatformStaticDefense
Forward Shield500Hull250
Aft Shield500System Health200
Design OriginUSFP

Defensive torpedo battery. Has a large supply of standardised torpedoes. Not especially threatening to a military ship, but very persistent and has a wide area of influence.

Max Beam Range 600Drone Endurance 20
Fwd DPM0
Aft DPM0
Total DPM0

USFP / USFP

Transport

transport_ship
USFP USFP Missing System Health Data ShipCivilianTransport
Forward Shield90Hull6
Aft Shield90System HealthUnknown
Design OriginUSFP

The Atlas class transport ship was designed as a reliable heavy lift vessel for both civilian and military use within the USFP. It is frequently deployed to move personnel vehicles and equipment between colonies and has earned a reputation for endurance and adaptability. With reinforced hull plating redundant life support systems and configurable cargo bays it excels in supporting large scale construction projects and emergency evacuations alike. The Atlas class stands as the logistical backbone of the USFP expansion efforts across known space.

No range data
Fwd DPM13.2
Aft DPM0
Total DPM13.2
